option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
services: gerenciadorfinanceiroresidencial-api: image: gerenciadorfinanceiroresidencial.api container_name: GerenciadorFinanceiroResidencial.Api ports: - "8080:8080" - "5211:5211" environment: ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT: Development build: context: . dockerfile: GerenciadorFinanceiroResidencial.Api/Dockerfile depends_on: postgres: condition: service_started
postgres: image: postgres:latest container_name: GerenciadorFinanceiroResidencial.PostgreSQL environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres POSTGRES_DB: gerenciador-financeiro volumes: - postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data
volumes: postgres:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
services: gerenciadorfinanceiroresidencial-api: image: gerenciadorfinanceiroresidencial.api container_name: GerenciadorFinanceiroResidencial.Api ports: - "8080:8080" - "5211:5211" environment: ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT: Development ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection: Host=postgres;Port=5432;Database=gerenciador-financeiro;Username=postgres;Password=postgres build: context: . dockerfile: GerenciadorFinanceiroResidencial.Api/Dockerfile depends_on: postgres: condition: service_healthy
postgres: image: postgres:latest container_name: GerenciadorFinanceiroResidencial.PostgreSQL environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres POSTGRES_DB: gerenciador-financeiro volumes: - postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres -d gerenciador-financeiro"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 10
volumes: postgres:
